description_long: This is a classic, upholstered chaise with a beige fabric exterior and a tufted diamond pattern along the backrest and armrests. The backrest and armrests are of equal height, curving gently outward and adorned with button tufting for a luxurious look. The seat is wide and flat, designed for comfortable lounging, and lacks any separate or loose cushions. The legs are short, wooden, and slightly curved, with a dark finish that contrasts subtly with the light upholstery. Decorative nailhead trim runs along the front of the armrests, adding a touch of traditional elegance. The overall silhouette is low and inviting, making it suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A beige, tufted chaise with curved armrests and backrest, wooden legs, and a wide, flat seat. Features diamond-patterned upholstery and decorative nailhead trim.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the chaise, tufted backrest and armrests, and the decorative nailhead trim.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the rolled armrest, and the profile of the wooden legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth back panel and the continuous height of the backrest and armrests.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side, showing the armrest, seat depth, and leg design.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is medium-height, gently curved, and features a diamond-tufted pattern with buttons, giving it a plush and classic appearance. It extends seamlessly into the armrests, creating a continuous, enveloping form.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both sides, rolled outward and matching the height and tufted design of the backrest.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, slightly curved, and made of dark-finished wood, with a traditional cabriole style visible at the front and simpler straight legs at the back.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid beige fabric with a prominent diamond-tufted pattern on the backrest and armrests, while the seat area is smooth and unadorned.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are no separate or loose cushions; the seat is a single, flat, upholstered surface integrated into the frame, with the backrest and armrests also fully upholstered and padded.
